import asyncio
from typing import Set

async def handle_connection(reader, writer):
    task = asyncio.create_task(heartbeat(writer))
    try:
        data = await reader.read(1024)
        writer.write(data)
        await writer.drain()
    finally:
        task.cancel()
        writer.close()

_background_tasks: Set[asyncio.Task] = set()

async def start_background_workers():
    tasks = [
        asyncio.create_task(process_queue()),
        asyncio.create_task(cleanup_stale_entries()),
        asyncio.create_task(sync_remote_state()),
    ]
    for task in tasks:
        _background_tasks.add(task)
        task.add_done_callback(_background_tasks.discard)

async def on_message_received(message):
    log_task = asyncio.create_task(log_message(message))
    metric_task = asyncio.create_task(update_metrics(message))
    _background_tasks.add(log_task)
    _background_tasks.add(metric_task)
    log_task.add_done_callback(_background_tasks.discard)
    metric_task.add_done_callback(_background_tasks.discard)
    result = await process_message(message)
    return result
